news.t: Morgan Stanley Unveils 6 ESG Exchange-Traded Funds

holdings.infoBox: CVMC is an equity ETF with a total of 622 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 2.06%, Marvell Technology at 1.98%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 1.49%, Western Digital at 1.40%, and Corning at 1.07%.

overview.description: The Calvert US Mid-Cap Core Responsible Index ETF (CVMC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Calvert US Mid-Cap Core Responsible index, a market-cap-weighted, ESG-screened index of US mid-cap stocks CVMC was launched on Jan 30, 2023 and is issued by Morgan Stanley.
infoTable: Calvert US Mid-Cap Core Responsible Index

data.title: Morgan Stanley Unveils 6 ESG Exchange-Traded Funds
data.text: Morgan Stanley MS +1.02% is expanding further into retail investing with its first exchange-traded funds, but faces a crowded field where legions of ETFs struggle to gain traction.
